message:
fix: remove debug prints and fix compile errors from concurrent refactors

- Remove 7 println!/eprintln! debug statements from codegen.rs that
  fired on every SELECT compilation and FK codegen path
- Remove 2 dbg!() calls from datetime.rs strftime handling
- Remove 4-line debug trace block from engine.rs strftime execution
- Fix garbled SORTER_SPILL_PAGE_SIZE constant name in engine.rs caused
  by overly broad PAGE_SIZE find-and-replace
- Add missing Arc import in core_types.rs for concurrent agent refactor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
